untranslatable_reason: Cash-flow-to-price ratio (CF/Price) is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. This signal requires fundamental data (cash flow and market value of equity) that is not available in the provided technical indicator set. Decile-based sorting logic cannot be expressed with the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires cross-sectional fundamental analysis using cash-flow-to-market-value-of-equity ratio sorted into deciles. This requires: (1) fundamental accounting data not available in technical indicators, (2) cross-sectional ranking/decile logic not expressible with the allowed operators (>, <, >=, <=, ==, crosses_above, crosses_below, is). Annual rebalancing in April is clear but cannot be operationalized without a calendar-based rebalance operator.
